title: 咖啡風味輪深度應用與專業品鑑紀錄指南：系統化感官訓練的基石
description: 深入解析 SCA 咖啡風味輪三層結構、四大應用技巧，並提供可直接使用的手沖品鑑紀錄表模板，幫助你從「好喝」進化到精準描述每一杯咖啡的細緻風味。
body_html:
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+TC:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Noto+Sans+TC:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
/* =====================================================
   CSS Variables — scoped to .sg-article
   ===================================================== */
.sg-article {
  --sg-accent:        #7C5230;
  --sg-accent-d:      #5E3D22;
  --sg-caramel:       #B5773E;
  --sg-gold:          #C4943A;
  --sg-gold-bg:       #F7EDD8;
  --sg-gold-bd:       #DFC08A;
  --sg-text-1:        #1C140C;
  --sg-text-2:        #4A3728;
  --sg-text-3:        #7A6555;
  --sg-bg:            #FFFFFF;
  --sg-bg-warm:       #FBF8F4;
  --sg-bg-tan:        #F2EBE1;
  --sg-border:        #E4D9CC;
  --sg-border-light:  #F0EAE0;
  --sg-serif:         'Noto Serif TC', Georgia, serif;
  --sg-sans:          'Noto Sans TC', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif;
  --sg-r:             6px;
  --sg-shadow:        0 2px 16px rgba(124,82,48,.10);
  --sg-shadow-hover:  0 6px 24px rgba(124,82,48,.18);

  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  color: var(--sg-text-1);
  line-height: 1.8;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

.sg-article *, .sg-article *::before, .sg-article *::after { box-sizing: border-box; }
.sg-article img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }
.sg-article a { color: var(--sg-accent); text-decoration: none; }
.sg-article a:hover { color: var(--sg-accent-d); text-decoration: underline; }

/* =====================================================
   Breadcrumb
   ===================================================== */
.sg-breadcrumb {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 24px 24px 0;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
}
.sg-breadcrumb a { color: var(--sg-text-3); }
.sg-breadcrumb a:hover { color: var(--sg-accent); }
.sg-breadcrumb span.sep { margin: 0 7px; }

/* =====================================================
   Article Header
   ===================================================== */
.sg-article-header {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 44px 24px 0;
}
.sg-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 10.5px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: .13em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--sg-caramel);
  background: var(--sg-gold-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--sg-gold-bd);
  border-radius: 2px;
  padding: 4px 10px;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.sg-h1 {
  font-family: var(--sg-serif);
  font-size: clamp(24px,3.8vw,36px);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.35;
  color: var(--sg-text-1);
  margin: 0 0 20px;
  letter-spacing: .02em;
}
.sg-article-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px 18px;
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
  padding-bottom: 32px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
  margin-bottom: 40px;
}
.sg-article-meta .dot { color: var(--sg-border); }

/* =====================================================
   Image Placeholder
   ===================================================== */
.sg-img {
  position: relative;
  background: var(--sg-bg-tan);
  border-radius: var(--sg-r);
  overflow: hidden;
  display: block;
  margin: 0;
}
.sg-img::before { content: ''; display: block; padding-top: 52.5%; }
.sg-img.r-16x9::before { padding-top: 56.25%; }
.sg-img.r-4x3::before  { padding-top: 75%; }
.sg-img img {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
}
.sg-img-label {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 8px;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
  font-size: 12.5px;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.sg-img-label svg { opacity: .35; }
.sg-img-caption {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 12px;
  padding: 28px 16px 10px;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
}

/* =====================================================
   TOC Sidebar — Desktop ≥ 1300px
   ===================================================== */
.sg-toc {
  position: fixed;
  top: 40%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  left: 16px;
  width: 192px;
  background: var(--sg-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
  border-radius: var(--sg-r);
  padding: 20px 0 16px;
  box-shadow: var(--sg-shadow);
  z-index: 100;
  max-height: 82vh;
  overflow-y: auto;
}
.sg-toc-heading {
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 10.5px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: .13em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
  padding: 0 16px 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sg-border-light);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.sg-toc nav a {
  display: block;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 12.5px;
  line-height: 1.45;
  color: var(--sg-text-2);
  padding: 5px 16px;
  border-left: 2px solid transparent;
  transition: all .2s;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.sg-toc nav a.sub { padding-left: 28px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--sg-text-3); }
.sg-toc nav a:hover,
.sg-toc nav a.active {
  color: var(--sg-accent);
  border-left-color: var(--sg-accent);
  background: var(--sg-bg-warm);
  text-decoration: none;
}
@media (max-width: 1299px) { .sg-toc { display: none; } }

/* =====================================================
   TOC FAB + Drawer — Mobile / Tablet
   ===================================================== */
.sg-fab {
  display: none;
  position: fixed;
  right: 16px;
  top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  z-index: 200;
  background: var(--sg-accent);
  color: #fff;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 50px;
  padding: 11px 13px;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 500;
  cursor: pointer;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(124,82,48,.38);
  writing-mode: vertical-rl;
  letter-spacing: .08em;
  transition: background .2s;
}
.sg-fab:hover { background: var(--sg-accent-d); }
@media (max-width: 1299px) { .sg-fab { display: block; } }

.sg-overlay {
  display: none;
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  background: rgba(28,20,12,.42);
  z-index: 300;
}
.sg-drawer {
  position: fixed;
  right: -280px;
  top: 0;
  width: 264px;
  height: 100%;
  background: var(--sg-bg);
  z-index: 301;
  padding: 20px 0;
  box-shadow: -4px 0 24px rgba(28,20,12,.14);
  overflow-y: auto;
  transition: right .28s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
}
.sg-drawer-close {
  float: right;
  margin: 0 16px 0 0;
  background: none;
  border: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 4px 10px;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
}
.sg-drawer .sg-toc-heading { margin-top: 36px; padding-left: 20px; }
.sg-drawer nav a { padding: 8px 20px; font-size: 14px; }
.sg-drawer nav a.sub { padding-left: 36px; font-size: 13px; }

.toc-open .sg-overlay { display: block; }
.toc-open .sg-drawer { right: 0; }

/* =====================================================
   Article Body
   ===================================================== */
.sg-body {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 24px 96px;
}
.sg-body p {
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 15.5px;
  line-height: 1.9;
  color: var(--sg-text-1);
  margin: 0 0 1.4em;
}
.sg-lead {
  font-family: var(--sg-serif) !important;
  font-size: 17px !important;
  line-height: 1.85 !important;
  color: var(--sg-text-2) !important;
}
.sg-body h2 {
  font-family: var(--sg-serif);
  font-size: clamp(19px,2.8vw,25px);
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--sg-text-1);
  margin: 64px 0 22px;
  padding-bottom: 14px;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--sg-border);
  position: relative;
  letter-spacing: .03em;
}
.sg-body h2::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -2px; left: 0;
  width: 44px; height: 2px;
  background: var(--sg-accent);
}
.sg-body h3 {
  font-family: var(--sg-serif);
  font-size: clamp(15px,2.2vw,18px);
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--sg-text-1);
  margin: 44px 0 16px;
  letter-spacing: .02em;
}
.sg-body h3::before {
  content: '';
  display: inline-block;
  width: 4px; height: 15px;
  background: var(--sg-accent);
  border-radius: 2px;
  margin-right: 10px;
  vertical-align: -2px;
}

/* Section label above h2 */
.sg-no {
  display: block;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 10.5px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: .14em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--sg-caramel);
  margin-bottom: 7px;
}

/* Highlight callout */
.sg-highlight {
  background: var(--sg-gold-bg);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--sg-gold);
  border-radius: 0 var(--sg-r) var(--sg-r) 0;
  padding: 16px 22px;
  margin: 28px 0;
}
.sg-highlight p {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 14.5px !important;
  color: var(--sg-text-2) !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   Flavor Wheel — 3-Layer Visualization
   ===================================================== */
.sg-wheel {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  border: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
  border-radius: var(--sg-r);
  overflow: hidden;
  margin: 32px 0;
}
.sg-wheel-col {
  padding: 22px 18px;
  border-right: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
}
.sg-wheel-col:nth-child(1) { background: var(--sg-bg-warm); }
.sg-wheel-col:nth-child(2) { background: var(--sg-bg); }
.sg-wheel-col:nth-child(3) { background: var(--sg-gold-bg); border-right: none; }
.sg-wheel-col-no {
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: .12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.sg-wheel-col-title {
  font-family: var(--sg-serif);
  font-size: 14.5px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--sg-text-1);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  line-height: 1.3;
}
.sg-wheel-col-sub {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin: 0 0 14px;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
}
.sg-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 5px; }
.sg-tag-pill {
  display: inline-block;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 11.5px;
  padding: 3px 9px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  border: 1px solid;
}
.sg-wheel-col:nth-child(1) .sg-tag-pill { background:#fff; border-color:var(--sg-border); color:var(--sg-text-2); }
.sg-wheel-col:nth-child(2) .sg-tag-pill { background:var(--sg-bg-warm); border-color:var(--sg-border); color:var(--sg-text-2); }
.sg-wheel-col:nth-child(3) .sg-tag-pill { background:#fff; border-color:var(--sg-gold-bd); color:var(--sg-accent); }

/* =====================================================
   Technique Cards
   ===================================================== */
.sg-cards {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 18px;
  margin: 28px 0;
}
.sg-card {
  background: var(--sg-bg-warm);
  border: 1px solid var(--sg-border-light);
  border-radius: var(--sg-r);
  padding: 22px 20px;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.sg-card::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 3px;
}
.sg-card:nth-child(1)::after { background: #C4943A; }
.sg-card:nth-child(2)::after { background: #B5773E; }
.sg-card:nth-child(3)::after { background: #7C5230; }
.sg-card:nth-child(4)::after { background: #5E3D22; }
.sg-card-icon {
  width: 38px; height: 38px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--sg-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 17px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.sg-card h4 {
  font-family: var(--sg-serif);
  font-size: 14.5px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--sg-text-1);
  margin: 0 0 8px;
  line-height: 1.45;
}
.sg-card p {
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.75;
  color: var(--sg-text-2);
  margin: 0;
}

/* =====================================================
   Flow Steps
   ===================================================== */
.sg-steps { margin: 24px 0; }
.sg-step {
  display: flex;
  gap: 18px;
  align-items: flex-start;
  padding: 18px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sg-border-light);
}
.sg-step:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.sg-step-no {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 34px; height: 34px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--sg-accent);
  color: #fff;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  margin-top: 1px;
}
.sg-step-body h4 {
  font-family: var(--sg-serif);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--sg-text-1);
  margin: 0 0 5px;
}
.sg-step-body p {
  font-size: 13.5px !important;
  color: var(--sg-text-2) !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
}

/* =====================================================
   Image Pair
   ===================================================== */
.sg-img-pair {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 14px;
  margin: 28px 0;
}

/* =====================================================
   Sensory Reference Table (2.1)
   ===================================================== */
.sg-ref-table-wrap {
  border: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
  border-radius: var(--sg-r);
  overflow: hidden;
  margin: 16px 0 32px;
}
.sg-ref-table-head {
  background: var(--sg-accent);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 12px 18px;
  font-family: var(--sg-serif);
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: .04em;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px;
}
.sg-ref-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
}
.sg-ref-table th {
  background: var(--sg-bg-warm);
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: .08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
  padding: 9px 16px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
}
.sg-ref-table td {
  font-size: 13.5px;
  color: var(--sg-text-1);
  padding: 11px 16px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sg-border-light);
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.sg-ref-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
.sg-ref-table tr:hover td { background: var(--sg-bg-warm); transition: background .15s; }

/* =====================================================
   Tasting Sheet Component
   ===================================================== */
.sg-sheet-tabs {
  display: flex;
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--sg-border);
  margin-top: 16px;
}
.sg-tab {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 13.5px;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
  padding: 9px 22px;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
  margin-bottom: -2px;
  transition: all .18s;
}
.sg-tab.on { color: var(--sg-accent); border-bottom-color: var(--sg-accent); font-weight: 500; }

.sg-panel { display: none; }
.sg-panel.on { display: block; }

/* Tasting sheet card */
.sg-sheet {
  border: 2px solid var(--sg-border);
  border-radius: var(--sg-r);
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-top: 0;
}
.sg-sheet-header {
  background: var(--sg-accent);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 13px 18px;
  font-family: var(--sg-serif);
  font-size: 13.5px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: .04em;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px;
}
.sg-sheet-header.alt { background: var(--sg-caramel); }

/* Params grid */
.sg-params {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr);
  background: var(--sg-bg-warm);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
}
.sg-param {
  padding: 12px 16px;
  border-right: 1px solid var(--sg-border-light);
}
.sg-param:last-child { border-right: none; }
.sg-param-lbl {
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: .09em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.sg-param-val {
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 13.5px;
  color: var(--sg-text-1);
  min-height: 20px;
  border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--sg-border);
  padding-bottom: 2px;
}
.sg-param-val.filled { border-bottom: none; font-weight: 500; }

/* Sensory table */
.sg-sheet-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
}
.sg-sheet-table th {
  background: var(--sg-bg-warm);
  font-size: 10.5px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: .08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
  padding: 9px 16px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
}
.sg-sheet-table td {
  font-size: 13.5px;
  color: var(--sg-text-1);
  padding: 11px 16px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sg-border-light);
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.sg-sheet-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }
.sg-sheet-table tr:hover td { background: var(--sg-bg-warm); transition: background .15s; }

/* Score badge */
.sg-score {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  width: 30px; height: 30px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
}
.sg-score.hi { background:#EAF4E8; color:#3A7A35; }
.sg-score.md { background:var(--sg-gold-bg); color:var(--sg-gold); }

/* Score dots for blank template */
.sg-dots { display:flex; gap:4px; }
.sg-dot-item {
  width: 16px; height: 16px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--sg-bg-warm);
  border: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
  font-size: 9px;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
}

/* Checklist */
.sg-checklist {
  background: var(--sg-bg-warm);
  padding: 16px 18px;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
}
.sg-checklist-title {
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: .09em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--sg-text-3);
  margin-bottom: 11px;
}
.sg-check-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 7px;
}
.sg-check {
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--sg-text-2);
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.sg-cb {
  flex-shrink: 0;
  width: 15px; height: 15px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--sg-border);
  border-radius: 2px;
  margin-top: 2px;
}
.sg-cb.on {
  background: var(--sg-accent);
  border-color: var(--sg-accent);
  position: relative;
}
.sg-cb.on::after {
  content: '✓';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 10px;
}

/* =====================================================
   FAQ — details/summary, pure CSS
   ===================================================== */
.sg-faq-list { margin: 8px 0; }
.sg-faq-item {
  border: 1px solid var(--sg-border);
  border-radius: var(--sg-r);
  margin-bottom: 9px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: box-shadow .2s;
}
.sg-faq-item[open] { box-shadow: var(--sg-shadow); }
.sg-faq-item summary {
  list-style: none;
  font-family: var(--sg-serif);
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--sg-text-1);
  padding: 17px 52px 17px 18px;
  cursor: pointer;
  position: relative;
  background: var(--sg-bg);
  transition: background .15s;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.sg-faq-item summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
.sg-faq-item summary::marker { display: none; }
.sg-faq-item summary:hover { background: var(--sg-bg-warm); }
.sg-faq-item[open] summary { background: var(--sg-bg-warm); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--sg-border-light); }
.sg-faq-item summary::after {
  content: '＋';
  position: absolute;
  right: 18px; top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 24px; height: 24px;
  background: var(--sg-bg-tan);
  border-radius: 50%;
  font-size: 14px; font-weight: 300;
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  color: var(--sg-accent);
  line-height: 24px;
  text-align: center;
  display: inline-block;
}
.sg-faq-item[open] summary::after { content: '－'; }
.sg-faq-answer {
  font-family: var(--sg-sans);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.85;
  color: var(--sg-text-2);
  padding: 18px 50px 18px 18px;
}
.sg-faq-answer p { margin: 0; }

   Responsive

  <article>
    <!-- ══════ Article Header ══════ -->
    <header class="sg-article-header">
      <div class="sg-tag">感官訓練 × 品鑑技法</div>
      <h1 class="sg-h1">咖啡風味輪深度應用與專業品鑑紀錄指南<br>系統化感官訓練的基石</h1>
      <div class="sg-article-meta">
        <span>matrix 生活美學專家</span>
        <span class="dot" aria-hidden="true">·</span>
        <time datetime="2026-04-21">2026 年 4 月 21 日</time>
        <span class="dot" aria-hidden="true">·</span>
        <span>閱讀時間約 8 分鐘</span>
      </div>
    </header>

    <!-- ══════ Article Body ══════ -->
    <main class="sg-body" id="sg-main">

      <!-- Hero Image -->
      <div class="sg-img" style="margin-bottom:44px;">
        <img src="https://img.1shop.tw/e2mJZnvrG0rg7v5AKPba5qkd/GBnwbKdx3dvm9a8mNW7954ej/original.jpg" alt="咖啡風味輪與手沖品鑑示意" loading="lazy">
      </div>

      <!-- Intro -->
      <p class="sg-lead">在精品咖啡的世界中，從單純的「好喝」到能夠精確描述細緻風味，需要一套系統性的工具與方法。SCA（精品咖啡協會）發布的<strong>咖啡風味輪（Coffee Taster's Flavor Wheel）</strong>不僅提供通用的風味語言，更是引導品鑑者深入感官世界的地圖——搭配完整的品鑑紀錄表，每一次沖煮都將成為有依據的感官實驗。</p>

      <!-- ════════ SECTION 1 ════════ -->
      <section>
        <h2 id="sec1">
          <span class="sg-no">Part 01</span>
          咖啡風味輪：從感官迷宮到風味地圖
        </h2>

        <p>咖啡風味輪將數百種複雜的風味化合物系統性歸納為易於理解的詞彙，幫助品鑑者從模糊的感受中抽絲剝繭出具體描述。它不僅是詞彙的集合，更是一種思維框架——引導我們有層次地感知與表達咖啡風味。</p>

        <!-- 1.1 -->
        <h3 id="sec1-1">1.1 風味輪的三層結構</h3>
        <p>風味輪的設計理念是<strong>從廣義到具體</strong>，由中心向外輻射形成三層同心圓，品嚐時依此層次逐步聚焦，是最有效率的辨識路徑。</p>

        <!-- Wheel Visualization -->
        <div class="sg-wheel" role="img" aria-label="咖啡風味輪三層結構示意">
          <div class="sg-wheel-col">
            <div class="sg-wheel-col-no">Layer 01</div>
            <div class="sg-wheel-col-title">核心層 Core</div>
            <p class="sg-wheel-col-sub">第一印象，最宏觀的八大分類</p>
            <div class="sg-tags">
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">花香</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">果香</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">甜感</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">堅果可可</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">烘焙</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">香料</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="sg-wheel-col">
            <div class="sg-wheel-col-no">Layer 02</div>
            <div class="sg-wheel-col-title">次級層 Secondary</div>
            <p class="sg-wheel-col-sub">縮小範圍，辨別風味子類別</p>
            <div class="sg-tags">
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">柑橘類</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">莓果類</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">熱帶水果</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">堅果</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">巧克力</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">焦糖</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="sg-wheel-col">
            <div class="sg-wheel-col-no">Layer 03</div>
            <div class="sg-wheel-col-title">外圍層 Outer</div>
            <p class="sg-wheel-col-sub">最精確的具體風味詞彙</p>
            <div class="sg-tags">
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">檸檬</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">柳橙</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">草莓</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">藍莓</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">榛果</span>
              <span class="sg-tag-pill">水蜜桃</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="sg-highlight">
          <p>💡 <strong>初學者建議</strong>：先穩固內圈八大類別的辨識，當能夠穩定辨識後再逐步向外圈細節邁進。不要一開始就試圖找出最精確的詞彙，這容易造成挫敗感，也難以建立感官信心。</p>
        </div>

        <!-- SCA wheel image -->
        <div class="sg-img" style="margin:32px 0;">
          <img src="https://img.1shop.tw/e2mJZnvrG0rg7v5AKPba5qkd/kEyLdZjRNLmLkpDnY8pWbz6O/original.png" alt="SCA 咖啡風味輪完整圖表" loading="lazy">
          <div class="sg-img-caption">SCA 咖啡風味輪 — 全球精品咖啡品鑑標準工具</div>
        </div>

        <!-- 1.2 -->
        <h3 id="sec1-2">1.2 深度應用技巧</h3>
        <p>認識結構只是起點，真正發揮風味輪的價值，在於將以下四種方法融入日常品鑑練習。</p>

        <div class="sg-cards">
          <div class="sg-card">
            <div class="sg-card-icon">🎯</div>
            <h4>由內而外，逐步聚焦</h4>
            <p>先辨識最廣泛的類別（果香？花香？），再判斷子類別（柑橘還是莓果？），最後鎖定具體詞彙如「檸檬卡士達」。循序漸進，建立感官信心。</p>
          </div>
          <div class="sg-card">
            <div class="sg-card-icon">🎨</div>
            <h4>顏色聯想，啟發感官</h4>
            <p>黃橙色代表柑橘、紅色對應莓果、棕色系對應堅果烘焙。品嚐時閉眼讓風味在腦海浮現色彩，能啟動聯覺反應，使辨識更直觀。</p>
          </div>
          <div class="sg-card">
            <div class="sg-card-icon">📍</div>
            <h4>感官校準，建立基準點</h4>
            <p>定期品嚐風味輪上提及的實際物品（新鮮檸檬、榛果、黑巧克力），以代表性豆款反覆對照，強化感官與詞彙的對應關係。</p>
          </div>
          <div class="sg-card">
            <div class="sg-card-icon">⚖️</div>
            <h4>對比品鑑，強化記憶</h4>
            <p>同時沖煮兩款風味差異大的咖啡對比品嚐，例如水洗 vs 日曬，能更清晰地感受純淨酸質與濃郁果香的差異，加速感官學習進程。</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- ════════ SECTION 2 ════════ -->
      <section>
        <h2 id="sec2">
          <span class="sg-no">Part 02</span>
          專業品鑑紀錄模板：系統化感官訓練的基石
        </h2>

        <p>要將每一次品嚐經驗轉化為可累積的知識，一套系統化的品鑑紀錄模板不可或缺。它能幫助你客觀記錄沖煮參數、感官體驗，並為下次修正提供數據依據，讓學習曲線穩步上升。</p>

        <!-- 2.1 -->
        <h3 id="sec2-1">2.1 品鑑紀錄的構成要素</h3>

        <p><strong>沖煮參數</strong>方面，需詳細記錄咖啡豆名稱、產地、處理法、烘焙程度與日期，以及研磨度、水溫、粉水比、總萃取時間、注水方式（悶蒸水量與時間、分段注水次數）。精準的參數記錄是複製成功沖煮的基礎，建議每次只調整一個變因，水溫調整幅度不超過 2°C。</p>

        <p><strong>感官評價</strong>則依序評估以下七大維度：</p>

        <div class="sg-ref-table-wrap">
          <div class="sg-ref-table-head">
            <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 8v4l3 3"/></svg>
            感官評估七大維度
          </div>
          <table class="sg-ref-table">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th style="width:155px;">評估維度</th>
                <th>品鑑重點</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              <tr><td><strong>乾香 Fragrance</strong></td><td>磨粉後注水前的香氣，預示咖啡潛在風味走向</td></tr>
              <tr><td><strong>濕香 Aroma</strong></td><td>注水後散發的氣味，通常比乾香更為豐富且具體</td></tr>
              <tr><td><strong>酸質 Acidity</strong></td><td>辨別明亮果酸（檸檬酸、蘋果酸）或柔和乳酸；留意是否有刺激醋酸感</td></tr>
              <tr><td><strong>甜感 Sweetness</strong></td><td>焦糖、蜂蜜或水果糖等甜感的強度與持久度；甜感能平衡酸與苦</td></tr>
              <tr><td><strong>醇厚度 Body</strong></td><td>咖啡在口中的重量感：輕盈如水、絲滑柔順或厚實飽滿</td></tr>
              <tr><td><strong>餘韻 Aftertaste</strong></td><td>吞嚥後留在口腔的乾淨程度、持續時間與愉悅感</td></tr>
              <tr><td><strong>平衡感 Balance</strong></td><td>各項風味元素是否和諧共存，沒有任何一項過於突出或缺失</td></tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        <!-- Image Pair -->
        <div class="sg-img-pair">
          <div class="sg-img r-4x3">
            <img src="https://img.1shop.tw/e2mJZnvrG0rg7v5AKPba5qkd/xWLzk147Y7ggKb92YV8mGo9O/original.jpg" alt="咖啡乾香品聞示意" loading="lazy">
            <div class="sg-img-caption">乾香：磨粉後第一印象</div>
          </div>
          <div class="sg-img r-4x3">
            <img src="https://img.1shop.tw/dmLqpoYEVREYo9xRbZy2XK7l/AZajx5K9lEmvPmv2lPJR4Wd2/original.jpg" alt="手沖悶蒸注水示意" loading="lazy">
            <div class="sg-img-caption">濕香：悶蒸時香氣最豐富</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- 2.2 -->
        <h3 id="sec2-2">2.2 品鑑操作流程</h3>

        <div class="sg-steps">
          <div class="sg-step">
            <div class="sg-step-no">1</div>
            <div class="sg-step-body">
              <h4>沖煮前：填寫基本資訊</h4>
              <p>先記錄咖啡豆基本資訊與預計沖煮參數，讓後續的感官評價有客觀的數據對照基礎。</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="sg-step">
            <div class="sg-step-no">2</div>
            <div class="sg-step-body">
              <h4>沖煮中：精準記錄參數</h4>
              <p>搭配具備計時與精準測重功能的電子秤（如 Matrix M2 PRO），記錄悶蒸水量、時間、分段注水量與總萃取時間，讓每一次調整都有數據依據。</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="sg-step">
            <div class="sg-step-no">3</div>
            <div class="sg-step-body">
              <h4>品嚐：系統性感官評價</h4>
              <p>磨粉後聞乾香，悶蒸時聞濕香，降溫至適口溫度後大口啜吸，讓咖啡液充分覆蓋口腔，依序感受各項維度，對照風味輪辨識具體詞彙並評分。</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="sg-step">
            <div class="sg-step-no">4</div>
            <div class="sg-step-body">
              <h4>分析與修正：填寫調整方向</h4>
              <p>品鑑結束後回顧紀錄，找出問題所在——是水溫太高導致苦味突出，還是研磨太粗造成萃取不足？根據分析在「修正建議」填寫下次調整方向。</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- 2.3 -->
        <h3 id="sec2-3">2.3 品鑑紀錄表</h3>
        <p>以下提供空白模板與填寫範例兩種版本，可直接參考使用。</p>

        <!-- Tab Toggle -->
        <div class="sg-sheet-tabs" role="tablist">
          <button class="sg-tab on"  id="tab-blank-btn"   data-tab="blank"   role="tab" aria-selected="true"  aria-controls="panel-blank">空白模板</button>
          <button class="sg-tab"     id="tab-example-btn" data-tab="example" role="tab" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="panel-example">填寫範例</button>
        </div>

        <!-- Panel: Blank Template -->
        <div class="sg-panel on" id="panel-blank" role="tabpanel">
          <div class="sg-sheet">
            <div class="sg-sheet-header">
              <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"/></svg>
              沐萃咖啡 手沖品鑑紀錄表
            </div>
            <div class="sg-params">
              <div class="sg-param"><div class="sg-param-lbl">日期</div><div class="sg-param-val"> </div></div>
              <div class="sg-param"><div class="sg-param-lbl">咖啡豆名稱</div><div class="sg-param-val"> </div></div>
              <div class="sg-param"><div class="sg-param-lbl">沖煮水溫</div><div class="sg-param-val"> </div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="sg-params" style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--sg-border);">
              <div class="sg-param"><div class="sg-param-lbl">粉水比</div><div class="sg-param-val"> </div></div>
              <div class="sg-param"><div class="sg-param-lbl">研磨度</div><div class="sg-param-val"> </div></div>
              <div class="sg-param"><div class="sg-param-lbl">總萃取時間</div><div class="sg-param-val"> </div></div>
            </div>
            <table class="sg-sheet-table">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th style="width:155px;">評估項目</th>
                  <th style="width:120px;">評分（1–10）</th>
                  <th>風味描述與心得</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                <tr><td><strong>乾香 Fragrance</strong></td><td><div class="sg-dots"><span class="sg-dot-item">1</span><span class="sg-dot-item">…</span><span class="sg-dot-item">10</span></div></td><td> </td></tr>
                <tr><td><strong>濕香 Aroma</strong></td><td><div class="sg-dots"><span class="sg-dot-item">1</span><span class="sg-dot-item">…</span><span class="sg-dot-item">10</span></div></td><td> </td></tr>
                <tr><td><strong>酸質 Acidity</strong></td><td><div class="sg-dots"><span class="sg-dot-item">1</span><span class="sg-dot-item">…</span><span class="sg-dot-item">10</span></div></td><td> </td></tr>
                <tr><td><strong>甜感 Sweetness</strong></td><td><div class="sg-dots"><span class="sg-dot-item">1</span><span class="sg-dot-item">…</span><span class="sg-dot-item">10</span></div></td><td> </td></tr>
                <tr><td><strong>醇厚度 Body</strong></td><td><div class="sg-dots"><span class="sg-dot-item">1</span><span class="sg-dot-item">…</span><span class="sg-dot-item">10</span></div></td><td> </td></tr>
                <tr><td><strong>餘韻 Aftertaste</strong></td><td><div class="sg-dots"><span class="sg-dot-item">1</span><span class="sg-dot-item">…</span><span class="sg-dot-item">10</span></div></td><td> </td></tr>
                <tr><td><strong>整體印象</strong></td><td><div class="sg-dots"><span class="sg-dot-item">1</span><span class="sg-dot-item">…</span><span class="sg-dot-item">10</span></div></td><td> </td></tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
            <div class="sg-checklist">
              <div class="sg-checklist-title">修正建議（下次可以如何調整？）</div>
              <div class="sg-check-grid">
                <div class="sg-check"><span class="sg-cb"></span><span>調整水溫：高 ／ 低</span></div>
                <div class="sg-check"><span class="sg-cb"></span><span>調整研磨：細 ／ 粗</span></div>
                <div class="sg-check"><span class="sg-cb"></span><span>調整粉水比：增加 ／ 減少</span></div>
                <div class="sg-check"><span class="sg-cb"></span><span>調整注水手法：悶蒸時間 ／ 注水段數</span></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div><!-- /panel-blank -->

        <!-- Panel: Filled Example -->
        <div class="sg-panel" id="panel-example" role="tabpanel">
          <div class="sg-sheet">
            <div class="sg-sheet-header alt">
              <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M9 11l3 3L22 4"/><path d="M21 12v7a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h11"/></svg>
              填寫範例：衣索比亞 古吉 水風鈴
            </div>
            <div class="sg-params">
              <div class="sg-param"><div class="sg-param-lbl">日期</div><div class="sg-param-val filled">2026 / 04 / 21</div></div>
              <div class="sg-param"><div class="sg-param-lbl">咖啡豆名稱</div><div class="sg-param-val filled">衣索比亞 古吉 水風鈴</div></div>
              <div class="sg-param"><div class="sg-param-lbl">沖煮水溫</div><div class="sg-param-val filled">92°C</div></div>
            </div>
            <div class="sg-params" style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--sg-border);">
              <div class="sg-param"><div class="sg-param-lbl">粉水比</div><div class="sg-param-val filled">1 : 15</div></div>
              <div class="sg-param"><div class="sg-param-lbl">研磨度</div><div class="sg-param-val filled">中細</div></div>
              <div class="sg-param"><div class="sg-param-lbl">總萃取時間</div><div class="sg-param-val filled">2 : 30</div></div>
            </div>
            <table class="sg-sheet-table">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th style="width:155px;">評估項目</th>
                  <th style="width:72px;">評分</th>
                  <th>風味描述</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                <tr><td><strong>乾香 Fragrance</strong></td><td><span class="sg-score md">8</span></td><td>檸檬皮、茉莉花</td></tr>
                <tr><td><strong>濕香 Aroma</strong></td><td><span class="sg-score md">8</span></td><td>柑橘、水蜜桃、蜂蜜</td></tr>
                <tr><td><strong>酸質 Acidity</strong></td><td><span class="sg-score hi">9</span></td><td>檸檬酸、水蜜桃酸，活潑且細緻</td></tr>
                <tr><td><strong>甜感 Sweetness</strong></td><td><span class="sg-score md">8</span></td><td>蔗糖、蜂蜜、水果糖</td></tr>
                <tr><td><strong>醇厚度 Body</strong></td><td><span class="sg-score md">7</span></td><td>輕盈絲滑，如紅茶般</td></tr>
                <tr><td><strong>餘韻 Aftertaste</strong></td><td><span class="sg-score md">8</span></td><td>乾淨持久，帶淡淡花香</td></tr>
                <tr><td><strong>整體印象</strong></td><td><span class="sg-score hi">9</span></td><td>清爽優雅，非常適合早晨</td></tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
            <div class="sg-checklist">
              <div class="sg-checklist-title">修正建議</div>
              <div class="sg-check-grid">
                <div class="sg-check"><span class="sg-cb on"></span><span>調整水溫：<strong>低</strong>（降 1°C，看能否減少酸質銳利感、提升甜感）</span></div>
                <div class="sg-check"><span class="sg-cb"></span><span>調整研磨：細 ／ 粗</span></div>
                <div class="sg-check"><span class="sg-cb"></span><span>調整粉水比：增加 ／ 減少</span></div>
                <div class="sg-check"><span class="sg-cb"></span><span>調整注水手法：悶蒸時間 ／ 注水段數</span></div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div><!-- /panel-example -->
      </section>

      <!-- ════════ FAQ ════════ -->
      <section class="sg-faq-list" style="margin-top:64px;">
        <h2 id="faq" style="margin-top:0;">
          <span class="sg-no">FAQ</span>
          常見問題
        </h2>

        <details class="sg-faq-item">
          <summary>什麼是咖啡風味輪（Coffee Flavor Wheel）？</summary>
          <div class="sg-faq-answer">
            <p>咖啡風味輪是由 SCA（精品咖啡協會）發布的標準化工具，將咖啡中數百種風味化合物歸納為三層同心圓結構，從內圈的八大類別（花香、果香、堅果可可等），逐步細化到外圈的具體詞彙（如檸檬、草莓、榛果），幫助品鑑者用共同語言溝通咖啡風味。</p>
          </div>
        </details>

        <details class="sg-faq-item">
          <summary>風味輪新手應該從哪裡開始？</summary>
          <div class="sg-faq-answer">
            <p>建議從最內圈的八大類別開始，先判斷「是果香還是花香？是堅果還是甜感？」，不要一開始就追求外圈的精確詞彙。搭配具代表性的咖啡豆（例如以衣索比亞水洗豆建立花果調基準，以巴西日曬豆建立堅果巧克力調基準），透過對比品鑑快速建立個人感官記憶。</p>
          </div>
        </details>

        <details class="sg-faq-item">
          <summary>品鑑紀錄表每次沖煮都要填嗎？</summary>
          <div class="sg-faq-answer">
            <p>建議至少在「刻意練習」的場合填寫，尤其是使用新豆子、嘗試新參數，或發現風味異常時。完整的紀錄讓你得以追蹤同一款豆子在不同沖煮參數下的風味變化，是加速學習曲線最有效的方法之一。</p>
          </div>
        </details>

        <details class="sg-faq-item">
          <summary>手沖咖啡的最佳萃取時間是多久？</summary>
          <div class="sg-faq-answer">
            <p>一般手沖建議總萃取時間落在 2:00–3:30 之間，常見目標為 2:30 左右。時間過短（< 2 分鐘）通常代表萃取不足，風味單薄、酸感偏尖；時間過長（> 3:30）則可能萃取過度，出現苦澀或木質感。研磨度、粉水比與注水方式都會影響萃取時間，建議每次只調整一個變因。</p>
          </div>
        </details>

        <details class="sg-faq-item">
          <summary>手沖咖啡酸質太強怎麼調整？</summary>
          <div class="sg-faq-answer">
            <p>可嘗試以下方向：（1）調細研磨度，增加萃取率；（2）提高沖煮水溫（+1–2°C）；（3）延長悶蒸時間；（4）減慢注水速度。通常先從「調細研磨度一格」開始，是最直接有效的調整方式。</p>
          </div>
        </details>
      </section>

    </main>
  </article>
</div><!-- /sg-article -->

<script>
(function () {
  var body = document.body;

  /* ── TOC Drawer ── */
  var fab     = document.getElementById('j-toc-fab');
  var overlay = document.getElementById('j-overlay');
  var close   = document.getElementById('j-drawer-close');

  function open()  { body.classList.add('toc-open'); }
  function close_() { body.classList.remove('toc-open'); }

  if (fab)     fab.addEventListener('click', open);
  if (overlay) overlay.addEventListener('click', close_);
  if (close)   close.addEventListener('click', close_);

  document.querySelectorAll('.toc-link-d').forEach(function (a) {
    a.addEventListener('click', close_);
  });

  /* ── TOC Active State (IntersectionObserver) ── */
  var headings = document.querySelectorAll('#sg-main h2[id], #sg-main h3[id]');
  var tocLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.toc-link');
  var active   = '';

  if ('IntersectionObserver' in window && headings.length) {
    var io = new IntersectionObserver(function (entries) {
      entries.forEach(function (e) {
        if (e.isIntersecting) {
          active = e.target.id;
          tocLinks.forEach(function (a) {
            a.classList.toggle('active', a.getAttribute('href') === '#' + active);
          });
        }
      });
    }, { rootMargin: '-72px 0px -60% 0px', threshold: 0 });

    headings.forEach(function (h) { io.observe(h); });
  }

  /* ── Tab Panels ── */
  document.querySelectorAll('.sg-tab').forEach(function (btn) {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
      var id = btn.dataset.tab;
      document.querySelectorAll('.sg-tab').forEach(function (b) {
        b.classList.remove('on');
        b.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false');
      });
      document.querySelectorAll('.sg-panel').forEach(function (p) { p.classList.remove('on'); });
      btn.classList.add('on');
      btn.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'true');
      var panel = document.getElementById('panel-' + id);
      if (panel) panel.classList.add('on');
    });
  });

  /* ── Smooth Scroll ── */
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(function (a) {
    a.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
      var el = document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'));
      if (el) { e.preventDefault(); el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); }
    });
  });
}());
</script>
